about.title: About Us
about.story: Founded in 2025 in Ireland, we connect trusted local professionals with people needing home services, repairs, lessons, moving, and more. Customers get fast quotes, verified reviews, and secure payments in one streamlined marketplace.
about.mission: Quality, speed and trust in every service request.
about.stats: Over 15,000 professionals • 120,000+ completed jobs • 4.7/5 average rating

serviceDetail.description1: Service usually includes planning, on-site execution, cleanup and final quality checks based on your home or business needs.
serviceDetail.description2: Verified professionals arrive prepared, communicate clearly and adapt scope, materials and timing to your priorities.
serviceDetail.description3: You can request custom quotes for urgent jobs, recurring plans or advanced requirements before confirming your booking.
serviceDetail.faq1q: How quickly can I receive quotes?
serviceDetail.faq1a: Most requests receive the first quote within 30 minutes during business hours.
serviceDetail.faq2a: Profiles are checked with ID and business verification before they can receive leads.
serviceDetail.faq3q: What if I am not satisfied?
serviceDetail.faq3a: Our support team reviews each case and applies first-job money-back protection where eligible.

legal.privacyBody: We process account, service request and payment data to match customers with providers, prevent fraud and improve platform reliability. Data is encrypted in transit and access is logged.
legal.termsBody: Providers are responsible for accurate service descriptions, legal compliance and timely delivery. Customers agree to share honest requirements and complete payments through platform-approved flows.
legal.cookieBody: We use essential cookies for sign-in and security, plus analytics cookies to improve search relevance, quote quality and conversion across customer and provider journeys.

contact.subtitle: Need help with a booking, payment or provider account? Reach our support team.
contact.name: Full name
contact.success: Your message has been sent. We will respond shortly.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Answers about bookings, quotes, payments and providers.
faqPage.q1: How many quotes can I receive?
faqPage.a1: Most customers receive 3 to 5 quotes depending on city and request details.
faqPage.a2: You review quotes first. Payment is made only after selecting a professional and confirming terms.
faqPage.a3: Yes. You can cancel open requests anytime from your dashboard before work starts.
faqPage.a4: Only customers with completed jobs can submit reviews for the hired professional.
faqPage.q5: Why can’t I see leads in my pro dashboard?
faqPage.a5: To receive leads, your account must be verified and you must select at least one service category and one county.
faqPage.q6: What happens if I choose the wrong county?
faqPage.a6: Matching is county-based, so wrong county selections can hide relevant jobs. Update your areas from the become-provider page.
faqPage.q7: Will I receive leads if I only choose 'Other'?
faqPage.a7: No. Matching runs on category_id, so you must select at least one real category from the list.
faqPage.q8: Why don’t quotes arrive immediately after posting a job?
faqPage.a8: Your request must be open and include correct category and county details. Quotes arrive as matching professionals become active.

retention.title: Data Retention Policy
retention.subtitle: How long we keep your data and why.
retention.p1: Account profile data is stored while your account remains active and for up to 24 months after closure for compliance.
retention.p2: Job requests, quote history and payment records are stored for financial, tax and dispute-resolution obligations.
retention.p3: Support messages are retained for up to 36 months to improve service quality and investigate fraud reports.
